## What
<!-- one paragraph: the change and the phase/roadmap item it serves -->

## Contract impact
- [ ] No contract change
- [ ] Contract changed → `contracts/` updated + `scripts/verify_contracts.py` green + CHANGELOG entry

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and green (`scripts/test.sh`)
- [ ] Docs updated (ARCHITECTURE / ADR if a decision changed)
- [ ] Provenance rule respected: no UI number without a traceable source
- [ ] Conventional commits (feat/fix/refactor/test/docs/perf)
